positive: Central composition, high-contrast illustration featuring a majestic crescent moon over a stylized bioluminescent forest landscape. The scene utilizes clean, sharp silhouettes of exotic flora and stylized deep-sea waves. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric teal, and subtle metallic gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric abstract print design, resembling high-quality tattoo flash art or a detailed woodblock print. Ensure strong, crisp outlines and excellent visibility for apparel printing. Maximal detail in linework, minimal gradients, vector aesthetic.
